chapter_title.en: Neglect leads to shame, foresight ensures safety

text: ١٨١. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): ثَمَرَةُ التَّفْرِيطِ النَّدَامَةُ، وَثَمَرَةُ الْحَزْمِ السَّلاَمَةُ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 181. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The result of neglect is shame, while the result of far-sightedness is safety.
